name: IHG One Rewards Premier Credit Card
effective_cost: Low if you use the free nights and spend-based credits

verdict.text: Keep if you stay at IHG properties a few times a year — thin otherwise

earn_note: 3× on general spend is a strong base rate for a $99 card — well above most co-brand hotel cards' catch-all tier. The 5× bucket (travel, dining, gas) is broad enough to matter for everyday spend, on top of the 10× IHG-direct rate.

points.note: IHG points are worth less per point than Marriott or Hyatt — NerdWallet valued them around 0.6¢ in 2026 — but the card issues them generously (up to 26X combined at IHG properties) and the 4th-night-free benefit plus anniversary certificate meaningfully boost real-world redemption value beyond the raw cpp. Never transfer to airlines; the ~5:1 ratio guts the value.

transfer_partners.highlight: IHG One Rewards transfers to roughly 34 airline partners, mostly at a 5:1 ratio (5,000 IHG points → 1,000 miles) — transfers must be initiated by phone, not online, and typically take weeks to post.
transfer_partners.recent_changes: No confirmed recent changes to the airline transfer chart.

credits.name: Annual Spend Bonus
credits.subtitle: $100 credit + 10,000 pts · after $20,000/yr spend
credits.description: A $100 statement credit plus 10,000 bonus points each calendar year you spend at least $20,000 on the card.
tips: Only count this if you're already going to hit $20,000/yr — it's not a small, easy threshold.

credits.name: Instacart Credit
credits.subtitle: $10/mo · up to $120/yr · + 3-mo Instacart+
credits.description: A complimentary 3-month Instacart+ trial plus up to $10 in monthly Instacart credits (through Dec 31, 2027). An active Instacart+ membership is required to receive the monthly credit; after the trial you're auto-enrolled at Instacart's standard rate unless you cancel.
tips: Set a reminder to cancel Instacart+ after the free trial if you don't want to keep paying for it.
$0 to you if you don't already grocery-shop through Instacart.

credits.name: DoorDash DashPass + Credit
credits.subtitle: 12-mo complimentary + $10/qtr non-restaurant · thru 2027
credits.description: One year of complimentary DashPass membership (DoorDash and Caviar) plus up to $10 off quarterly on non-restaurant DoorDash orders, both active through December 31, 2027.
tips: Requires activation and payment with this card at checkout to earn the quarterly credit.

credits.name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck / NEXUS Credit
credits.subtitle: $120 · every 4 years
credits.description: Statement credit up to $120 every four years for a Global Entry, TSA PreCheck, or NEXUS application fee. Shown here amortized to an annual figure.
tips: Apply for Global Entry, not just TSA PreCheck — it includes TSA PreCheck and covers the same credit.

credits.name: United TravelBank Cash
credits.subtitle: $25 × 2 · after registering MileagePlus
credits.description: Up to $50 annually ($25 twice a year) in United TravelBank Cash after registering your United MileagePlus account with the card.
tips: Only useful if you actually fly United — TravelBank Cash only applies toward United tickets.

credits.name: Anniversary Free Night Certificate
credits.subtitle: up to 40,000-point category · every card anniversary
credits.description: One free night certificate earned each account anniversary year, redeemable at IHG properties with a redemption cap of 40,000 points. Extra points from your IHG account can top off a higher-category stay. Must be redeemed within 12 months.
tips: $150 here is a conservative estimate for a capped-value redemption — actual value swings a lot by property category.
Use points to bridge the gap at a hotel priced just above the 40k cap rather than wasting the certificate on a cheap property.

credits.name: 4th Reward Night Free
credits.subtitle: on 4+ consecutive award nights, same property
credits.description: On any reward-night stay of 4 or more consecutive nights at the same property, the 4th night is free (unlimited redemptions per year).
tips: Only pays off on award stays already 4+ nights long — not a general-purpose credit.
$100 here is a rough single-stay estimate; frequent long award stays could be worth more.

insurance.detail: Theft & collision, secondary in the US, rentals of 31 days or less

protection_note: Solid mid-tier protections bundled with Mastercard World Elite — trip cancellation and rental car coverage are both present, though rental coverage caps out at 31-day rental terms and is secondary in the US. Nothing here beats a premium travel card's limits.
rental_note: Secondary coverage for theft and collision on rentals of 31 days or less, in the US and abroad — decline the counter's CDW and pay with this card, but use a card with primary coverage if you rent for longer stretches.

status_perks.name: IHG One Rewards Platinum Elite Status
status_perks.note: Complimentary with the card for as long as you hold it — includes room upgrades when available, a welcome amenity, and bonus points on stays. Diamond Elite (IHG's top tier) unlocks after $40,000 in card spend per calendar year.

services.name: No foreign transaction fees
services.detail: Zero FX fees on international spend.

services.name: Mastercard World Elite Benefits
services.detail: Lyft ride credits, Booking.com prepaid-stay discounts (up to 7% off), and other World Elite Mastercard perks bundled with the card.

additional_cards.title: Authorized Users

benefits.text: Free to add, plus a 10,000-point bonus for adding one within 3 months of account opening
Earns IHG One Rewards points on their spend (into your account)
Does not get their own Platinum status or Free Night Certificate

additional_cards.note: Authorized users are free, and adding one within the first 3 months earns an extra 10,000-point bonus on top of the welcome offer.

timeline.text: Instacart ($10/mo credit + 3-month Instacart+ trial) and DashPass benefits added, active through Dec 31, 2027.
IHG Rewards Club program and cards rebranded to IHG One Rewards.
